section_title: Revocation and renunciation may be expressed or may be implied in
content:
207. Revocation and renunciation may be expressed or may be implied in
and
the conduct of the principal or agent respectively.

or implied
A empowers B to let A's house. Afterwards A lets it himself. This is an implied
revocation of B's authority.
